then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Address shown as "广东省汕头市科技东路11号" with no postal code. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

1_1_1.requirement: Inspection site address — report header / Factory Review checklist — Verify the full factory address is written in English and includes street, building, floor, city, province/state, country, and postal code. Address must not contain Chinese characters.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Inspector marks "Yes" with no remark, but the on-site address differs from the booked address. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

1_1_2.requirement: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm the on-site factory address matches the address recorded in the booking. If they differ, a clear remark must be added to the Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks section.

items.question: Does the inspector remark list defects broken down by PO number?
Does the inspector remark include a total defect percentage?

1_2_1.requirement: Inspector's Remark — report header summary — Verify that a complete list of all defects found is provided, broken down by PO number, with a structured format: "PO xxx: X pcs defect found / Total: X% defect found." If large quantities of defective units are found in the bulk, this must be clearly explained at the beginning of this section.

extract.question: Does the inspector remark list defects broken down by PO number?
Does the inspector remark include a total defect percentage?

1_3_1.requirement: Available Quantity Check — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify production status thresholds are met before proceeding with inspection. For PSI: finished quantity must be 100% AND packed quantity must be ≥ 80% to proceed. For DUPRO: both finished and packed quantities must be > 20% to proceed. If thresholds are not met, inform Quality and issue a missing inspection report.

items.question: Does a remark in the report clearly explain the quantity discrepancy (shortage or overage vs booking)? Answer true only if an explicit explanation is present.

1_3_2.requirement: Available Quantity Details table — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify that any discrepancy between the booking quantity and the on-site quantity (shortage or overage) is clearly noted in the report with an explanation.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Tools calibration answered "No" with no corresponding explanation in the Summary Review. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

1_4_1.requirement: Summary review — end of report — For any "No" response recorded anywhere in the Inspection Details fields, a corresponding explanation must be present in the Summary Review section.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Booking references style 261938; measurement chart and report header show 261838. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

2_1_1.requirement: PO ref and SKU — report header, care label, hangtag, carton marking — Confirm that the style number and PO number on the on-site product identification (care label header, barcode hangtag, shipping carton) exactly match the booking information. If they do not match, the service must be treated as failed, a missed inspection report issued, and the reason clearly stated.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Booking states "Midnight Blue"; on-site product shows "Navy" with no remark. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: the color code or description on site does not match the booking is not identified or mentioned in the report

2_1_2.requirement: Color code / description — General Information and product identification labels — If the color code or description on site does not match the booking, proceed with the inspection. Record the actual color(s) and quantity breakdown in the report with a remark identifying the discrepancy.

2_1_3.requirement: Lot number — hangtag vs. carton marking — Verify that the lot number on the hangtag matches the lot number on the shipping carton. If they do not match, mark this as Failed and add a remark.

2_2_1.requirement: Are the QIMA documents signed? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm that the Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC are all signed by both the inspector and the factory representative. Photos of all signed documents must be included in the report.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Inspector selects cartons all from the same pallet and marks the result as Pass. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_1_1.requirement: Random carton selection — Product Specifications checklist — Confirm that cartons were selected fully randomly. If random selection was not possible, the result must be marked as Failed.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Carton reads "Fait en Chine" and the inspector fails the Outer Packing section. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_1_2.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist — Verify the carton side reads "Made in China / Fabrique en Chine." If the wording is incorrect (e.g., "Fait en Chine"), record a MINOR defect remark but do not fail this section. Misspellings of color and country of origin on the carton are also MINOR defects requiring a remark but not a failure.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that photos of (1) cartons stacked on pallets, (2) carton seals, and (3) labelling on the side of boxes are included in the report under the Specifications section.

3_1_3.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that photos of (1) cartons stacked on pallets, (2) carton seals, and (3) labelling on the side of boxes are included in the report under the Specifications section.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Anti-mold sheet not present; inspector marks result as Pass without remark. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_1_4.requirement: Inner Packing & Unit Packing — Product Specifications checklist — Verify availability of mold prevention unit (anti-mold sheet or desiccant pack) and vent hole as specified in the tech pack. All products must have anti-mold sheets or desiccant packs.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Carton is marked PO 081901, style 261740, but the hangtag inside shows PO 082001. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_1_5.requirement: Match packing info — Product Specifications checklist — Verify that the PO number, item/style number, and product description on the product identification inside the carton match the information on the corresponding export carton marking.

3_1_6.requirement: Carton drop test — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of the carton drop test must NOT be included in the report unless the test fails. Only a failure requires photos.

extract.question: What is the Carton drop test result? (PASS, FAIL, or NOT_APPLICABLE)
How many photos are attached to the Carton drop test checkpoint?

3_1_7.requirement: Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of measuring the boxes (tape measure applied to carton sides or weight scale reading) must NOT be included in the report. Only the dimensions/weight results table and carton overview photos are required.

extract.question: How many photos are on Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight?

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Folding method differs from tech pack; inspector fails the Specifications section. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification is not identified or mentioned in the report

3_1_8.requirement: Folding method — Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks — If the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification, record this in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section for this reason.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Clear swift attaches found; inspector fails the Product Labels section. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_1_9.requirement: Swift attaches — serial tags / Inspector's Remark — Swift attaches for serial tags must be black. If they are clear/transparent, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Joker tags attached with black plastic swift attaches; inspector fails the Specifications section. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: Report context does not match 'denim pants' — rule is not applicable

3_1_10.requirement: Joker tags — denim pants only / Inspector's Remark — For denim pants, joker tags must be sewn on with thread. If attached with black plastic swift attaches instead, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Product Labels — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that all hang tags and care labels are photographed together and grouped in the Product Labels section of the report. Do not scatter label photos across different sections.

3_2_1.requirement: Product Labels — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that all hang tags and care labels are photographed together and grouped in the Product Labels section of the report. Do not scatter label photos across different sections.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: The style number on the barcode hangtag reads 261838 instead of 261740. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_2_2.requirement: Product Labels — style number, PO, color, lot number consistency — Verify that the style number, PO number, color(s), and lot number are visible and consistent across: (1) the care and content label header (style number and PO number only), (2) the serial barcode hangtag (style number, color(s), PO number, lot number), and (3) the shipping carton marking (style number, color(s), sizes, PO number, lot number).

3_2_3.requirement: Product Logo — Product Specifications checklist — Carefully check the physical product for the brand logo, including on sewn-on trims and interior labels. Do not mark as N/A or "no product logo" without a thorough check of all surfaces and trims.

extract.question: What is the Product Logo checkpoint result?
What value(s) are recorded for Product Logo? Return as comma-separated text.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Logo label font on bulk slightly differs from approval sample; inspector records as Minor and passes. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk is not identified or mentioned in the report

3_2_4.requirement: Product Labels — brand logo comparison vs. approval sample — If there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk, the report must be marked FAIL. Brand logo variation is a CRITICAL defect.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Size tab color on bulk differs from approval; inspector records as Minor. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab is not identified or mentioned in the report

3_2_5.requirement: Size tab — Product Specifications checklist — If there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab, the report must be marked FAIL. Size tab variation is a MAJOR defect.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Language order on bulk care label differs from approval; inspector fails the Product Labels section. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

3_2_6.requirement: Care content label — language sequence — Misprinting or variation in the sequence of languages on care content labels compared to the approval sample is NOT a reason to fail the report.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Products shipped on unbranded hangers when tech pack specifies Joseph Ribkoff logo hangers; no remark in report. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: the lot is to be shipped on hangers is not identified or mentioned in the report

3_2_7.requirement: Hangers — Product Specifications checklist (when applicable) — If the lot is to be shipped on hangers, verify that hangers bear the Joseph Ribkoff logo as specified in the tech pack.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Classify untrimmed thread ends by length using the photo as evidence.

4_1_1.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Classify untrimmed thread ends by length using the photo as evidence.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A stain on the front panel is classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_2.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All dirt and stain defects must be classified as MAJOR, regardless of size or location.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A stitching skip on the side seam is classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_3.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All stitching defects must be classified as MAJOR.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A small hole in the fabric is classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_4.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Yarn defects and holes must be classified as MAJOR.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A crease visible at 1 m on the front panel is classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_5.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Wrinkles, over-press marks, or creases visible from 1 meter away must be classified as MAJOR.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A puckered seam causing partial opening classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_6.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any seam with excessive puckering, poor tension, or linking that causes the seam to open must be classified as MAJOR.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Product silhouette differs from approval sample; classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_7.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any product whose shape or form differs from the specifications or approval sample must be classified as a MAJOR workmanship defect.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A rhinestone is falling off; classified as MINOR. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

4_1_8.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any trim that is missing, not installed securely, or falling off must be classified as MAJOR. Trim placement and installation must conform to the tech pack and/or approval sample.

4_2_1.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section / report photos — Include a maximum of 5 photos per defect type. If the same defect is found on more than 5 units, upload only 5 representative photos and document the total count in the report. For multiple references or colors, include only 1 photo per color.

5_1_1.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — Product Dimensions SL checklist; Attachments section — Verify that the measurement chart uses the correct Joseph Ribkoff mandatory POM template for the product category (see table below), that the style number in the chart matches the report SKU, and that the attached Excel file is named exactly "Measurement Chart - [style number]" (e.g., "Measurement Chart - 261740.xlsx").

extract.question: What is the measurement chart attachment filename on Product Dimensions Result?

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A POM in "Front HSP" is 5/8" out of spec; the cell is not highlighted and the measurement section is marked Pass. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

5_1_2.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — measurement chart (Excel attachment) / report result field — All out-of-tolerance measurements must be highlighted in yellow in the Excel file. Apply the tolerance rule as follows: if all out-of-tolerance values are within ±1/8", classify as MINOR — add a remark and do not fail the section. If any tolerance exceeds ±1/8", highlight in yellow with red text — the measurement section must be marked FAIL.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: A result cell in the M size column contains the letter "o" instead of a numeric value; style number field is blank. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

5_1_3.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — header row and content of measurement chart — Verify that (1) no column is left empty, (2) the style number is written in the chart header, (3) top-row bulk measurements are identified by size and/or color, and (4) no typo errors exist (e.g., letters entered in numeric result cells).

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Product Dimensions Result — checklist photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots (print screen of POM) and the Excel file must both be uploaded exclusively in the Product Dimensions Result section. Product weight photos must NOT appear in this section. The print screen must be legible an

5_1_4.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — checklist photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots (print screen of POM) and the Excel file must both be uploaded exclusively in the Product Dimensions Result section. Product weight photos must NOT appear in this section. The print screen must be legible and not blurry.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Denim pant inspection reports 13 units measured. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: Report context does not match 'denim category' — rule is not applicable

5_1_5.requirement: Product Dimensions — total sample size (denim category only) — For denim products, 20 units must be measured (effective September 10, 2021), using sampling level S4 or Level 1 based on booking quantity.

5_2_1.requirement: Tests checklist — all test checkpoints / report photos — Include only 1 photo per test in the checklist. For failed tests, provide only 1 photo per failure. Do not upload multiple photos for the same test.

extract.question: How many photos are on the Color shading check?

5_2_2.requirement: Stitch density check — Tests checklist / report photos — The stitch count per inch must be clearly stated as a numeric value in the report, with a supporting photo taken from a seam assembly — not from sewing on the main label.

extract.question: What is the inspector comment on the Stitch density check?

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Ironing, washing, treatment check — Tests checklist / report photos — Include clear photos of both the approval sample and the bulk product side by side, each with a caption identifying which is which.

5_2_3.requirement: Ironing, washing, treatment check — Tests checklist / report photos — Include clear photos of both the approval sample and the bulk product side by side, each with a caption identifying which is which.

5_2_4.requirement: Barcode scanning test — Tests checklist / report photos — The UPC 13 scanner must be used (not UPC 12). Upload 1 photo per barcode type present on the product. If a barcode scan result is missing a leading zero, record this as a remark but do not fail this section.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Symmetry check — Tests checklist / report photos — A verification of the front facing must be done and must be visible in the report. Fold the product on its symmetry axis or use a measurement tool to compare. The result and a supporting photo must be present.

5_2_5.requirement: Symmetry check — Tests checklist / report photos — A verification of the front facing must be done and must be visible in the report. Fold the product on its symmetry axis or use a measurement tool to compare. The result and a supporting photo must be present.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Leg twisting noted in remarks but no fit model photos are provided. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

unless.question: Does this never-flag condition apply (if yes, do not flag)? Condition: leg twisting is identified during inspection of denim pants is not identified or mentioned in the report

5_2_6.requirement: Denim pants — leg twisting / fit model — If leg twisting is identified during inspection of denim pants, the pants must be fitted on a fit model to validate the finding. Clear front and back view photos must be taken on the fit model and uploaded.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Tests checklist — fit model photos (all products) — Samples must be tried on a fit model and photos provided in the report.

5_2_7.requirement: Tests checklist — fit model photos (all products) — Samples must be tried on a fit model and photos provided in the report.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Approval Sample Comparison — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Each approval sample comparison photo must show the on-site bulk product and the approval sample physically side by side. Each photo must have a caption explicitly identifying which item is the approval sample. The appro

5_3_1.requirement: Approval Sample Comparison — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Each approval sample comparison photo must show the on-site bulk product and the approval sample physically side by side. Each photo must have a caption explicitly identifying which item is the approval sample. The approval sample is identified by a green "QIMA SAMPLE" tag; if the tag is missing, note this in the Other Remarks section.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Starting pictures — report photo section — Verify that a starting photo is present showing the inspector standing in front of the factory logo or name (factory identifier clearly visible).

6_1_1.requirement: Starting pictures — report photo section — Verify that a starting photo is present showing the inspector standing in front of the factory logo or name (factory identifier clearly visible).

6_1_2.requirement: All checklist sections — report photos throughout — Exactly 1 photo per checkpoint is required. Duplicate photos must not appear in the report. General factory environment photos (exterior, inspector walking around) must not be added.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? All photos — report-wide — All photos must have captions describing what they show. A photo without a caption is a reportable issue.

6_1_3.requirement: All photos — report-wide — All photos must have captions describing what they show. A photo without a caption is a reportable issue.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Product Dimensions Result — report photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots and the Excel file must be uploaded only in the Product Dimensions Result section. Verify these materials do not appear in any other section of the report.

6_1_4.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — report photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots and the Excel file must be uploaded only in the Product Dimensions Result section. Verify these materials do not appear in any other section of the report.

7_1_1.requirement: Workmanship sampling standards — Workmanship section header — Verify the workmanship inspection uses the correct sampling level and AQL values.

extract.question: What is the major AQL level shown in the workmanship section?

7_1_2.requirement: Product Dimensions SL checklist — sampling header — Verify the measurement sampling uses the correct level and AQL.

extract.question: What is the minor AQL level shown in the workmanship section?

8_1_1.requirement: Overall result — report header — The overall result must be PASS only if ALL conditions below are met. Any single failing condition must result in a FAIL overall result.
